analysis.stakeholders: Business unit leaders, Data Science, Engineering, advertisers
fitReasons: 9 years at Yahoo in nearly identical domain — targeting, audience segmentation, data activation at scale
Owned $500M+ revenue across targeting infrastructure with direct experience in audience addressability
Sr. Director experience managing PM teams with cross-functional leadership across engineering and data science
Deep privacy compliance experience (GDPR/CCPA) across targeting and identity systems
Current JPMC role adds AI/ML and agentic platform experience — directly relevant to JD's AI requirement
gaps: Left Yahoo in 2023 — may need to address 2-year gap from the specific Yahoo ecosystem
Google Cloud Platform listed as nice-to-have — Ili's cloud experience is less GCP-specific
analysis.strategy: Lead with the Yahoo heritage — Ili essentially built the data activation capabilities this role now manages. Frame JPMC as adding cutting-edge AI/agentic skills on top of deep adtech foundation. Emphasize the $500M revenue ownership and cross-vertical data leverage.

subtitles.jpmc: Agentic AI platform for investment banking – search, ranking, and workflow automation
subtitles.yahoo: Addressability, targeting infrastructure, and consumer data activation across 20B+ daily ad decisions
subtitles.newrelic: Billing, provisioning, and packaging systems during hypergrowth
subtitles.conversant: Tag management, mobile measurement, and conversion tracking

resumeData.summary: Sr. Director-level Product leader with 15+ years driving consumer data activation, audience segmentation, and targeting infrastructure at scale. At Yahoo, owned $500M+ annual revenue across targeting systems and led data activation strategies that drove measurable business impact across multiple verticals. Built and scaled audience addressability systems for brands, publishers, and DSPs/SSPs, enabling personalized ad experiences across 20B+ daily decisions. Currently leading agentic AI platform development at JPMorgan Chase, applying LLM-powered search and automation to enterprise workflows. Proven track record of managing PM teams, driving cross-functional alignment with data science and engineering, and delivering privacy-compliant data solutions under GDPR and CCPA.
